svg.text: Best run AL-20260330-104 reached 1.3488 val_bpb. 74 scored runs are tracked here, with 20 kept and 54 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260330-130 (discard) tested if quantization-friendly finishing is real, the best version may need both a gentler tail and a short stabilization window.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
